section.heading: Organization
section.chapeau: In order for a State to be eligible to receive allotments under this part—

paragraph.content: the State shall demonstrate eligibility under section 3025 of this title;
the State agency designated by the State shall demonstrate compliance with the applicable requirements of section 3025 of this title; and
each area agency on aging designated by the State agency and participating in such a program shall demonstrate compliance with the applicable requirements of section 3025 of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–73, title VII, § 704, as added Pub. L. 102–375, title VII, § 701, Sept. 30, 1992, 106 Stat. 1273.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 3058c, Pub. L. 89–73, title VII, § 705, as added Pub. L. 98–459, title VII, § 701, Oct. 9, 1984, 98 Stat. 1791, related to administration of program, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 100–175, title I, § 181, title VII, § 701(a), (b), Nov. 29, 1987, 101 Stat. 964, 983, effective Oct. 1, 1987, with certain exceptions.
A prior section 704 of Pub. L. 89–73 was classified to section 3045c of this title prior to repeal by Pub. L. 95–478.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section inapplicable with respect to fiscal year 1992, see section 905(b)(6) of Pub. L. 102–375, set out as an Effective Date of 1992 Amendment note under section 3001 of this title.
